titleStmt.title: SII 5.448: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 448. (A.R. No. 156 of 1894). ON THE INSIDE OF THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmalaṟ tiruvum poruceya maṭantaiyun tāmaraik kuvimulai ceyappuyat tiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭ tāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉpeṟattiḷaippa veṇṭirai yuṭutta maṇṭiṇi kiṭakkait tirunila maṭantai yurimaiyiṟ
kaḷippa camaiyamum nitiyun tarumamun taḻaippa vimaiyavar viḻākkoṭi yiṭantoṟu meṭuppak karuṅkali kaṉal keṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiyar Aruntoḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷarppac curutiyun tamiḻun tolvaḷaṅ kulava porutiṟalāḻi pūtalañ cūḻa Orukai yi
rucevi mummata nāṟkoṭṭayirāvatamutal ceyatirukoṟṟat teṇṭicaiyāṉai yerutta meṟik kaṇṭanā ṭemateṉak kayal kaḷikūra kocalan tuḷuvaṅ kukiraṅ kuccaram pocala makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅka miḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ kavuṭan teliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉa mutalā
vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilak kiḻamaiyil muṭipuṉai ventaṟ korutaṉi nāyakaṉeṉ ṟulakettat tirumuṭi cūṭic ceṅko loccik koṟṟattāḷk kuḷirkuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ kaṟṟaik kavari kāvalar vica miṭaikatir navamaṇi virasiṁ hāsa nattuṭaṉ
muṭicūṭi yuyarkulat tiruveṉap paṅkayamalaṟ karaṅ kuvittup pārttivar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉic cuṭaroḷimaulic cuṭarmaṇi meliṭa viṭac civanta viṇaimalar ciṟaṭik kamala matukaraṅ kamalam vantaṇuku mulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaru
ḷiya śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ śrīsundara pāṇṭiya- de vaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭu nāḷ toḷāyirat teṇpat teṭṭiṉāl maturotaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyil paḷḷiyaṟaikkūṭattu paḷḷippiṭam maḻavarāyaṉi leḻu
ntaruḷi Iruntu veda mum śāstra mum poy vyākhyā tākkaḷā yirukkum catu- rvvedibha ṭṭarkaḷ per Irunūṟṟirupattunālvar ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi veda mum śāstra mum poy vyākhyā tākkaḷā yirukkum caturvvedibha ṭṭarkaḷ per Irunūṟṟirupa
ttu nālvaṟkku paṅku Irunūṟṟirupattu nālum de vatāṉap paṇiceyvirutti paṅku Irupatum Ākap paṅku Irunūṟṟu nāṟpattu nālukkum murappu nāṭṭuk kūṭalūrum kiḻaikkūṭalū ruḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷukkuk kiḻellai taṇporunta Āṟṟukku meṟkum teṉṉellai mut
tālaṅkuṟicciyāṉa rāja[ siṁ ha] maṅkalattu Ellaikkum ceñlūrāṉa tiruvaraṅkaccatu- rvvedi maṅkalattu Ellaikkum vaṭakkum melellai Immurappunāṭṭuk kālāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ teṉṉāṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai taṇporunta Āṟṟukkut teṟkum Āka nā
ṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparippum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḷḷiccantam paḻantevatāṉamum cūraṅkuṭināṭṭup paṭṭiṉamarutūrpāl kulacekarapperunteruvil vaḻukūruṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyaṉ kūttāṭuvāṉāṉa vi
llavataraiyaṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyaṉāy Ivvūr Ulakuyyavantaīśvara muṭaiyār tevatāṉam maṉai toṭṭamum nattamum Uṭpaṭac cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilam nālumāvum nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilam muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperum Uḻavum mutalun tavirttu
Orur Orupuravākkik kuṭiyirukkalām nattattile kuṭiyiruppākap paṅkum maṉaiyu meḻuti murappunāṭṭup pocalaviraso mide vaccaturvvedi maṅkalameṉṟu māmaṭipeyarāl Eṭṭāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal brahmade yañ ceyyappeṟaveṇu
meṉṟum Ivvūr Iṟukkumiṭattu Irupattunālaṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nila maḷantu payir pārttu viḷainta nilattukku Antārayamum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum
maṟṟum Eppeyarppaṭṭiṉavu muṭpaṭa kārukku māttāl kācu kālum mutal virapāṇṭiyaṉāl nellu mukkalamum tulāviṟaiccu viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟupātiyum Eḷḷu varaku tiṉaippul liṟuṅku viḷainta nilattukku
māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum pacāṉam Ivvaricaiyumāka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṟuppatāka Iṟai kaṭṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu māmaṭi namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil veda mum śāstra mum poy vyākhyā tākkaḷā yirukkum caturvvedibha ṭṭarkaḷ peyar
Irunūṟṟirupattu nālvaṟku paṅku Irunūṟṟirupattu nālum tevatāṉappaṇicey virutti paṅku Irupatum Ākap paṅku Irunūṟṟu nālpattu nālukkum murappunāṭṭuk kūṭalūrum kiḻaikkūṭalūrum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷukkuk kiḻellai taṇpo
runta Āṟṟukku meṟkum teṉṉellai muttālaṅkuṟicciyāṉa rājasiṁha maṅkalattu Ellaikkum ceñalūrāṉa tiruvaraṅkaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu Ellaikkum vaṭakkum melellai I m]murappunāṭṭuk kālāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉteṉṉāṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai
taṇporunta Āṟṟukku teṟkum Āka nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puñceyum nattamun toṭṭamum kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparippum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉamum paḷḷiccantamum cūraṅkuṭināṭṭu paṭṭiṉamarutūrpāl kulacekarapperunteruvil vaḻukū
ruṭaiyāṉ Utaiyaṉ kūttāṭuvāṉāṉa villavataraiyaṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya Ivvūr Ulakuyyavantaīśvara muṭaiyāṟku tevatāṉamāṉa toṭṭamum nattamu muṭpaṭa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉ kolāl nilam nālumāvum nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilam muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻamperum Uḻavu mutalu
n tavirttu Orur Orupuravākki kuṭiirukkalām nattattile kuṭi Iruppākap paṅkum maṉaiyum Eḻuti murappunāṭṭup pocaḷaviraso mide vaccaturvvedi maṅkalameṉṟu māmaṭipeyarāl Ivvāṇṭu brahmade yañ ceyvatāka Iṭukaveṉṟum Ivvūr Iṟukkumiṭattu Irupattu
nālaṭiyāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉkolāl nilamaḷantu payir pārttu viḷainta nilattukku Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavarācciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum maṟṟum Eppeyarpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa kārukku māttāl
kācu kālum mutal virapāṇṭiyaṉāl nellu mukkalamum tulāviṟaiccu viḷainta nilattukku Ivvaricaiyil Oṉṟupātiyum Eḷ varaku tiṉaippul liṟuṅku viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tirama miraṇṭum pacāṉa mivvaricaiyumāka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṟuppa
tāka Iṭṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam Olaiyun taraccoṉṉom . kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrādityavat celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymo ḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai tirumallināṭṭut taṭaṅkaṇṇicciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ ṉu
yyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉ viracoḻatevaṉāṉa kurukulattaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭu cakkarapāṇinallūr Arayaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāya ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.448 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
